payload.answer: Recorded an attempted fetch failure for the given URL and noted that content could not be retrieved; no article content was stored.

entity_resolution.reason: No stable entity identifiers beyond the URL and error code were provided.

payload.intent: Record outcome of attempting to fetch an article URL for memory-architecture context, without asserting missing article content.

memory_cards.statement: An attempted fetch of https://example.com/missing resulted in a 404 network error; article content was not retrieved.
The provided context indicates this (missing) article URL is intended to be useful for memory architecture, but its content could not be accessed due to the fetch failure.

details: Created durable memory cards capturing the fetch failure and its impact on content availability.
Did not store or infer article contents because retrieval failed.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later to confirm whether it is temporarily unavailable.
Check for typos or alternate canonical URLs for the intended article.
If available, use a cached copy or a different source for the same content.
Store the planned memory-architecture purpose separately from any article content until retrieval succeeds.
